title: HomeEX
description: An EssentialsX (non-affiliated) Addon that add a GUI to the Homes system, with player-based icons customisation
body:

[![Discord link image][image]][hyperlink]

(tooltip)

# HomeEX by INFINITY Studios.

## Main Features

- GUI Addon for the homes of EssentialsX
- Plug and Play, no configuration required
- Using EssentialsX API, no migration required
- Custom home icons per home, set by the player
- Only replaces /homes command, can still use
/home [home] like normal
- Unlimited homes support, 15 per pages.


The plugin is open-source. If you have any issues, please post them on github.

For more “instant” support or just to talk about the plugins, join the community on discord!
https://discord.gg/jAk5PKYVeU
